title: Community and Communication Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Help or work done for others.
choices: service
deliver
thought
rounds.answer: service
rounds.explanation: service: Help or work done for others.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Something difficult; or, to test someone.
choices: service
deliver
challenge
rounds.answer: challenge
rounds.explanation: challenge: Something difficult; or, to test someone.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Shaped like a circle.
choices: deliver
circular
service
rounds.answer: circular
rounds.explanation: circular: Shaped like a circle.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: To bring something to a person or place.
rounds.answer: deliver

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Something more important than other things.
rounds.answer: priority

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.answer: plain

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.answer: The library started a free book service for the town.
She shared her thought about the new plan.
The maths test was a big challenge.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 1: Describe a Service in Your Community
rounds.target: In my community, there is a ______.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 3: Twenty Questions: Guess the Job

rounds.target: Explain one important unit idea, give a reason with because, and respond to two follow-up questions.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The scientist works in a lab.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The table is circular, so everyone can sit around it.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The population of our city is growing.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'quality' mean in this unit?
choices: How good or bad something is.
Help or work done for others.
To bring something to a person or place.
rounds.answer: How good or bad something is.

rounds.prompt: What does 'quantity' mean in this unit?

To bring something to a person or place.
An amount or number of something.
rounds.answer: An amount or number of something.
rounds.explanation: quantity: An amount or number of something.

rounds.prompt: What does 'deliver' mean in this unit?
choices: An idea or opinion in your mind.

rounds.answer: To bring something to a person or place.
